template_data.quote_html: The question isn't which vehicle is best. It's which one you can win on today.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy with bold label 'WRONG PATH' and red X icon. Three short stacked labels: 'OASIS+', 'SEWP', 'CIO-SP4'. Right panel white/light with bold label 'RIGHT SEQUENCE' and green upward arrow. Three short stacked labels: 'GSA SCHEDULE', 'PAST PERF.', 'SPECIALS'. Center: illustrated professional standing at a road fork, choosing a path. Bold headline top: 'PICK THE RIGHT VEHICLE FIRST'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
